desc: Baseline ladder: composite_v1, smooth_compounder, momentum_lowvol, momentum_quality_lowvol. K=5,10,20,30. EW, inv_vol, vol_score. Regime: none, 200ma_loose, 200ma, 200ma_strict, conservative, aggressive.
Walk-forward LGBM ranker. lgbm, lgbm_qual, lgbm_smooth. K=5,10,20. EW, inv_vol. Regime: none, 200ma.
Sharpe maximization: larger K=25-50, vol-triggered regime, dual/triple regime, min-var weights. lgbm and lgbm_smooth.
IC analysis and Sharpe-target model. Cross-sectional IC via Spearman. IC target variants. Baseline references.
Very large K: regime-only K=20-200, lgbm K=50-150, lgbm_smooth K=40-100, hybrid 2x pre-filter K=20-50.
Volatility targeting: SPY vol-based scaling. target_vol in {12%,15%,18%,22%}. K=20,30,40,50. Regime: 200ma, 200ma_loose. score_fn: lgbm, lgbm_smooth.
Trend filters: d_sma200 > {0,0.02,0.05}, rs_6m_spy > {0,-0.05}. K=20,30,40,50. vt=18%, regime_loose, lgbm.
Two-way signal blend: lgbm×(1-w)+sharpe_12m×w, w in {0.10,0.20,0.30,0.40,0.50}. K=20,25,30,40. vt=18%, regime_loose.
Sharpe-target LGBM: train on rank(fwd_ret/vol_12m). Pure Sharpe-target, 70/30 ensemble with std LGBM. K=20,30,40,50. vt=18%, regime_loose.
High-IC signals: breakout_strength_60 (IC=0.088), crt_6m (IC=0.081), sharpe_12m (IC=0.043). Pure signals, 50/50 blend, 4-way blend, LGBM+highIC. K=20,30,40,50,60. Various regimes.
Alternative weighting: inv_vol (ref), ERC (equal risk contribution), inv_vol² (double inv vol), inv_vol with 5/7/10% cap, ERC with 7/10% cap. K=20,25,30,35,40. vt=15%,18%.

note: Deflated Sharpe Ratio adjustment requires using this total count across all experiments. Current best Sharpe=1.834 OOS 2007-2021.
